title: dsRNAs treatment with RNase T1 and DNase I
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2jtrv","text":"For dsRNA sequencing by nanopore sequencing, this protocol was used. Before treating samples with RNase T1, you should measure the total concentration of RNAs in the samples by using a nanodrop or Qubit device, as RNase T1 has the ability to partially digest double-stranded RNAs in the absence of single-stranded RNA.   ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

DNase I Reaction Buffer (10X)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6tqgv","text":"3. RNase T1","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b6294","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1heso","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b3c68","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"duration","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"duration":0,"guid":"E23D0CA035C311ED85CABBA6FBAEFC0A","id":0,"label":"","pause":null,"preset":[],"start":null}}}}
steps: Add 50 units RNase T1 per 1µg of total RNA and 1 unit DNase I per 2µg of total RNA
Add 10X DNase Buffer with MgCl2 (final concentration should be 1X).
Incubate at 37 degrees C for 20 min.
creator: Vahid Jalali Javaran
